title: Playground Admin Ledger
concept: A compact WordPress-admin-style dashboard for repeated Playground use, organized as operational cards and tables with a right-side detail drawer for the selected Playground and Site Manager tool.
flows: browse Blueprint gallery and category filters
save to browser storage or local directory
navigate Homepage, WP Admin, and WordPress paths
use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, and export tools
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection messaging
all Blueprints gallery with category filters and search
destructive reset and saved reload messaging
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, tree, and code editor affordances
Blueprint file view with copy link, download bundle, upload, and run controls
database driver, SQLite path, and database size
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty state
